Support Our Mission

TV Ministries

SPANDANA TV carries the Gospel, prayer, and hope into homes every morning.

Daily Broadcast

Subhavaartha Channel

SPANDANA TVlive every day.

Through television ministry, the Word reaches families and seekers in their homes each morning. Every broadcast carries Scripture, prayer, encouragement, and the hope of Jesus Christ beyond physical walls.

Watch Live Contact Ministry
On Air

Broadcast Time

5:30 AM - 6:00 AM

Every morning on Subhavaartha TV

Broadcast Time

5:30 AM - 6:00 AM

Every morning

Channel

Subhavaartha TV

Telugu Gospel broadcast

Mission

Hope in every home

Prayer, Word, and encouragement

Media Outreach

The Gospel moves through every screen

TV ministry helps the message continue even when people are far from a church, a conference, or an outreach meeting.

Preaching the Word

Clear Gospel teaching reaches families who may never attend an outreach meeting, carrying the message of Christ into homes each morning.

Prayer and Encouragement

Viewers are strengthened through prayer, Scripture, testimony, and pastoral care that speaks to daily burdens and spiritual needs.

Media With Purpose

Television extends the ministry beyond village boundaries, helping Gospel truth reach Telugu-speaking families across many places.

One message can reach many homes at once.

Behind The Broadcast

Every message is prepared with prayer.

Each program is prepared, recorded, and shared with care so families can receive Scripture, encouragement, and prayer in their own homes.

1

Daily airtime for Gospel teaching and prayer.

2

Recording, editing, travel, and careful production.

3

Follow-up prayer and Gospel materials for viewers.

4

Messages prepared with clarity, excellence, and pastoral care.

Watch Live Contact Ministry

Tune In Daily

Watch SPANDANA TV every morning from 5:30 AM to 6:00 AM.

Watch Live
✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh
Savior's Heartbeat
Ministries · Est. 1976

Preaching and Preparing People for HIS Coming. Serving communities across India with the transforming love of Jesus Christ since 1976.

“God Holy Spirit may touch you and speak to your heart to fulfill the Savior's Heartbeat.”
